sarooj.title: About the Architectural Engineering Company
sarooj.description: Rahsaz Dej Sarooj is a Grade 5 certified construction and road engineering company in Iran with over ten years of experience in the construction and renovation of residential, commercial, office buildings, and villas across various regions of the country. Backed by a team of highly experienced professionals with academic expertise, the company is fully prepared to deliver architectural design and construction projects to the highest standards.
